human_verification.notes: Verified bookkeeping-services boundary handling, research-contract source coverage, source-record traceability, confidentiality and approval controls, execution-state logic, completion-evidence requirements, and scenario-to-ability mappings.

review_notes: All 12 scenarios pass with explicit bookkeeping execution, exception, refusal, confidentiality, approval, and completion-evidence behavior.
Required abilities across shared, workflow-phase, and professional-and-information-services profile are fully covered and mapped.

specialist_owned_evidence: Bookkeeping workflow progression is tied to named bank, invoice, bill, receipt, journal, ledger, reconciliation, AP, AR, and close-prep artifacts.
Uncategorized, unmatched, unreconciled, unsupported, stale, duplicate, approval-pending, and confidentiality-sensitive work items are explicit exception cases.
Tax, legal, audit, review, compilation, assurance, contractual signoff, payment approval, write-off approval, payroll approval, and management-decision boundaries route to adjacent specialists.
Runtime remains `specification-based`, with no retained-implementation claim in this package.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; open questions are converted into explicit escalation, refusal, or tenant-fact dependencies.

Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation/results.json and evaluation/functionality-map.json, and runtime remains specification-based until a separately promoted retained implementation exists.
